active.name: Full Body A

blocks.title: Block 1 — Lower body (straight sets)
blocks.note: 3 sets — focus on form over speed, every rep controlled

exercises.name: Goblet squat
exercises.tip: Hold DB at chest. Feet shoulder width, toes slightly out. Sit down between your heels, elbows inside knees at the bottom. Drive through full foot to stand.

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.note: Bodyweight or light DB across hips
exercises.tip: Feet flat, drive through heels. Squeeze glutes hard at the top and hold 1 second. Don't let your lower back take over — it's a glute exercise.

blocks.title: Block 2 — Full body circuit
blocks.note: 2 rounds — move at your own pace

exercises.name: Side step lunge
exercises.tip: Big lateral step, push hips back as you sink. Keep the stepping foot fully flat on the floor. Return to center before the next rep.

exercises.name: Resistance band hip abduction
exercises.tip: Stand on one foot, slight knee bend. Lift other leg out to the side against the band. Control the return — don't let it snap back.

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.tip: Lie on back, arms up, knees at 90°. Lower opposite arm and leg toward floor without letting your lower back lift. Exhale on the way down.

blocks.title: Yoga finish
blocks.rest: No rest — flow at your own pace

exercises.name: Yoga flow
exercises.note: Lower body focus — hip flexors, hamstrings, glutes
exercises.tip: Good options: low lunge, pigeon pose, supine figure-four, legs up the wall. Let the body open up after the loading work.

active.progression: When 3 × 12 goblet squats and 3 × 15 bridges feel comfortable, add 5 lbs. On the circuit, add 1–2 reps per exercise before increasing resistance.

active.name: Full Body B

blocks.title: Block 1 — Push & pull (straight sets)
blocks.note: 3 sets — pairing push and pull keeps it balanced

exercises.name: Incline or wall push-up
exercises.note: Wall = easier / bench incline = harder / floor = hardest
exercises.tip: Start where you can do 8 clean reps. Body in a straight line, elbows at 45° from torso. Progress toward floor push-ups over time.

exercises.name: Single-arm DB row
exercises.tip: Brace one hand on bench. Let shoulder blade protract at the bottom, pull elbow back and up. Feel the back work, not just the arm.

exercises.name: DB lateral raise
exercises.tip: Lead with elbows, slight forward lean. Raise to shoulder height — no higher. Slow on the way down.

exercises.name: Resistance band pull-apart
exercises.tip: Arms straight out front, pull band to chest. Slow controlled return. Great for posture and shoulder health.

exercises.name: Bird-dog
exercises.tip: On all fours. Opposite arm and leg, extend slowly and hold. Hips stay level. Think long — reach through fingertips and heel.

blocks.title: Yoga finish
blocks.rest: No rest — flow at your own pace

exercises.name: Yoga flow
exercises.note: Upper body focus — chest, shoulders, spine
exercises.tip: Good options: cat-cow, thread the needle, chest opener, seated twist, child's pose.

active.progression: Progress push-ups from wall → incline bench → floor as strength builds. On rows, add 5 lbs when 3 × 10 feels controlled.

active.name: Quick Flow

blocks.title: Movement circuit
blocks.note: 1–2 rounds — 20–25 min total including yoga finish

exercises.name: Bodyweight squat
exercises.tip: Feet shoulder width, arms out front for balance. Sit back and down. Easy pace.

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.tip: Drive through heels, squeeze at the top. Slow and deliberate.

exercises.name: Incline push-up
exercises.tip: Controlled descent, full press. Stop before form breaks.

exercises.name: Side-lying clam shell
exercises.tip: Hips stacked. Open the top knee like a clam, hold 1 second. Keep hips still.

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.tip: Slow and deliberate. Lower back stays flat against the floor throughout.

blocks.title: Yoga finish
blocks.rest: No rest — this is the main event

exercises.name: Yoga flow
exercises.tip: Sun salutations, standing poses, floor work — whatever feels right today.

active.progression: When 2 rounds feels easy and you finish with energy left, try adding one more exercise to the circuit.

active.name: Stretch & Strengthen

exercises.name: Bird-dog
exercises.tip: On all fours. Extend opposite arm and leg. Hold at the top. Hips perfectly level. Breathe steadily through the hold.

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.tip: Lower back presses into the floor the whole time. If it lifts, reduce the range of motion.

exercises.name: Side-lying clam shell
exercises.tip: Hips stacked. Open knee against band, hold 1 second. Don't let the pelvis rock back.

exercises.name: Boat pose
exercises.tip: Seated, lean back, legs lifted, arms forward. Keep chest tall. Bend knees to make it easier.

blocks.title: Yoga finish
blocks.note: 10–15 minutes — this is the main event today

exercises.name: Yoga flow
exercises.tip: Pigeon, supine twist, figure-four, legs up the wall, savasana.

active.progression: Progression here is longer holds and better form. When 2 rounds feels easy, add a third. Never add load to this session.
